creator: ady@ady.ro
text:
Another source tarball change (timestamp now: Jun 03 21:06). Apply
this patch _after_ applying the previous one:

--8<--
--- files/md5.orig      Thu Jun  4 20:27:05 1998
+++ files/md5   Thu Jun  4 20:27:22 1998
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (imap-4.1.BETA.tar.Z) = 40199ea7d54d5f24929aae8a586b00c2
+MD5 (imap-4.1.BETA.tar.Z) = 495e7fd8df10dc380d5571aa4b9e6fdb

--8<--

 Thank you,
 Ady (@warpnet.ro)
